title.en: Issue a Fungible ESDT Token on MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new fungible ESDT token on the MultiversX blockchain. Define the token name, ticker, initial supply, and decimal precision. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, the token identifier (e.g. MYTICKER-xxxxxx) will be assigned by the protocol.
description.de: Erstelle und gib einen neuen fungiblen ESDT-Token auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. Definiere Token-Name, Ticker, initiale Versorgung und Dezimalgenauigkeit. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe wird der Token-Identifier (z.B. MYTICKER-xxxxxx) vom Protokoll zugewiesen.

description.en: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.

title.en: Issue a Fungible ESDT Token on MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new fungible ESDT token on the MultiversX blockchain. Define the token name, ticker, initial supply, and decimal precision. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, the token identifier (e.g. MYTICKER-xxxxxx) will be assigned by the protocol.
description.de: Erstelle und gib einen neuen fungiblen ESDT-Token auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. Definiere Token-Name, Ticker, initiale Versorgung und Dezimalgenauigkeit. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe wird der Token-Identifier (z.B. MYTICKER-xxxxxx) vom Protokoll zugewiesen.

description.en: The full name of the token (e.g. 'MyToken'). 3–20 alphanumeric characters.
description.de: Der vollständige Name des Tokens (z.B. 'MeinToken'). 3–20 alphanumerische Zeichen.

description.en: The uppercase ticker symbol (e.g. 'MTK'). 3–10 uppercase alphanumeric characters.
description.de: Das Ticker-Symbol in Großbuchstaben (z.B. 'MTK'). 3–10 alphanumerische Großbuchstaben.

description.en: The initial token supply in the smallest unit (no decimal scaling). E.g. for 1000 tokens with 2 decimals, enter 100000.
description.de: Die initiale Token-Versorgung in der kleinsten Einheit (ohne Dezimal-Skalierung). Z.B. für 1000 Token mit 2 Dezimalstellen: 100000 eingeben.

description.en: Number of decimal places for the token (0–18). E.g. 18 for EGLD-like precision, 2 for cent-like precision.
description.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen des Tokens (0–18). Z.B. 18 für EGLD-ähnliche Genauigkeit, 2 für Cent-ähnliche Genauigkeit.

title.en: Issue an NFT Collection on MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new Non-Fungible Token (NFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. Each token in the collection will be unique. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint individual NFTs.
description.de: Erstelle und gib eine neue Non-Fungible Token (NFT) Kollektion auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. Jeder Token in der Kollektion ist einzigartig. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe muss die NFTCreate-Rolle zugewiesen werden, um NFTs zu erstellen.

description.en: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.

title.en: Issue an NFT Collection on MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new Non-Fungible Token (NFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. Each token in the collection will be unique. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint individual NFTs.
description.de: Erstelle und gib eine neue Non-Fungible Token (NFT) Kollektion auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. Jeder Token in der Kollektion ist einzigartig. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe muss die NFTCreate-Rolle zugewiesen werden, um NFTs zu erstellen.

description.en: The full name of the NFT collection (e.g. 'MyNFTCollection'). 3–20 alphanumeric characters.
description.de: Der vollständige Name der NFT-Kollektion (z.B. 'MeineNFTKollektion'). 3–20 alphanumerische Zeichen.

description.en: The uppercase ticker symbol for the collection (e.g. 'MYNFT'). 3–10 uppercase alphanumeric characters.
description.de: Das Ticker-Symbol der Kollektion in Großbuchstaben (z.B. 'MEINNFT'). 3–10 alphanumerische Großbuchstaben.

title.en: Issue an SFT Collection on MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.
description.de: Erstelle und gib eine neue Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) Kollektion auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. SFTs kombinieren Eigenschaften von fungiblen und non-fungiblen Tokens. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe muss die NFTCreate-Rolle zugewiesen werden.

description.en: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.

title.en: Issue an SFT Collection on MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.
description.de: Erstelle und gib eine neue Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) Kollektion auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. SFTs kombinieren Eigenschaften von fungiblen und non-fungiblen Tokens. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe muss die NFTCreate-Rolle zugewiesen werden.

description.en: The full name of the SFT collection (e.g. 'MyGameItems'). 3–20 alphanumeric characters.
description.de: Der vollständige Name der SFT-Kollektion (z.B. 'MeineSpielItems'). 3–20 alphanumerische Zeichen.

description.en: The uppercase ticker symbol for the collection (e.g. 'ITEMS'). 3–10 uppercase alphanumeric characters.
description.de: Das Ticker-Symbol der Kollektion in Großbuchstaben (z.B. 'ITEMS'). 3–10 alphanumerische Großbuchstaben.

description.en: Mint a new NFT or SFT within an existing MultiversX collection. You must own the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role for the collection to use this. Provide the collection identifier, quantity, name, royalties, optional metadata hash, attributes, and a media URI. No EGLD fee required — only gas.
description.de: Minte ein neues NFT oder SFT innerhalb einer bestehenden MultiversX-Kollektion. Du musst die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle für die Kollektion besitzen. Gib die Kollektion-ID, Menge, Name, Royalties, optionalen Metadaten-Hash, Attribute und eine Medien-URI an. Keine EGLD-Gebühr erforderlich — nur Gas.

description.en: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.

Mint a new NFT or SFT within an existing MultiversX collection. You must own the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role for the collection to use this. Provide the collection identifier, quantity, name, royalties, optional metadata hash, attributes, and a media URI. No EGLD fee required — only gas.
description.de: Minte ein neues NFT oder SFT innerhalb einer bestehenden MultiversX-Kollektion. Du musst die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle für die Kollektion besitzen. Gib die Kollektion-ID, Menge, Name, Royalties, optionalen Metadaten-Hash, Attribute und eine Medien-URI an. Keine EGLD-Gebühr erforderlich — nur Gas.

description.en: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3'). Must be an NFT or SFT collection where you hold the create role.
description.de: Der Kollektion-Token-Identifier (z.B. 'MEINNFT-a1b2c3'). Muss eine NFT- oder SFT-Kollektion sein, für die du die Erstellungsrolle besitzt.

description.en: Number of tokens to mint. Use 1 for a unique NFT, or more for SFTs where multiple copies exist.
description.de: Anzahl der zu mintenden Tokens. 1 für ein einzigartiges NFT, oder mehr für SFTs mit mehreren Kopien.

description.en: The display name of this specific NFT (e.g. 'My Rare Dragon #1').
description.de: Der Anzeigename dieses spezifischen NFTs (z.B. 'Mein Seltener Drache #1').

description.en: Creator royalty in basis points (0–10000). E.g. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. Set to 0 for no royalties.
description.de: Creator-Royalty in Basispunkten (0–10000). Z.B. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. 0 für keine Royalties.

description.en: Optional content hash (e.g. IPFS CID) for off-chain metadata integrity verification. Leave empty if not needed.
description.de: Optionaler Inhalts-Hash (z.B. IPFS-CID) zur Integritätsprüfung von Off-Chain-Metadaten. Leer lassen wenn nicht benötigt.

description.en: Custom NFT attributes as a string (e.g. 'rarity:legendary;power:95'). Leave empty if not needed.
description.de: Benutzerdefinierte NFT-Attribute als Zeichenkette (z.B. 'seltenheit:legendär;kraft:95'). Leer lassen wenn nicht benötigt.

description.en: The URI pointing to the NFT's media or metadata (e.g. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' or 'ipfs://Qm...').
description.de: Die URI, die auf das Medien- oder Metadaten-Asset des NFTs verweist (z.B. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' oder 'ipfs://Qm...').

title.en: Assign NFT Create Role on MultiversX

description.en: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.
description.de: Weise die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle einer Adresse für eine NFT- oder SFT-Kollektion zu. Diese Rolle ist erforderlich, bevor NFTs geprägt werden können. Nur der Kollektion-Eigentümer kann Rollen zuweisen.

description.en: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.

title.en: Assign NFT Create Role on MultiversX

description.en: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.
description.de: Weise die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle einer Adresse für eine NFT- oder SFT-Kollektion zu. Diese Rolle ist erforderlich, bevor NFTs geprägt werden können. Nur der Kollektion-Eigentümer kann Rollen zuweisen.

description.en: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3').
description.de: Der Kollektion-Token-Identifier (z.B. 'MEINNFT-a1b2c3').

description.en: The address to assign the NFT create role to. Typically your own wallet address.
description.de: Die Adresse, der die NFT-Erstellungsrolle zugewiesen werden soll. Typischerweise deine eigene Wallet-Adresse.

success.en: NFT create role assigned for collection {{COLLECTION_ID}}.

description.en: Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.
description.de: Entwrappe WEGLD Token zu nativem eGold (EGLD). Konvertiere gewraptes EGLD zurück zu nativem EGLD für die direkte Verwendung im eGold-Netzwerk.

Unwrap WEGLD tokens to native eGold (EGLD). Convert wrapped EGLD back to native EGLD for direct use on the eGold network.
description.de: Entwrappe WEGLD Token zu nativem eGold (EGLD). Konvertiere gewraptes EGLD zurück zu nativem EGLD für die direkte Verwendung im eGold-Netzwerk.

description.en: Amount of WEGLD tokens to unwrap to EGLD.
description.de: Betrag an WEGLD Token zum Entwrappen zu EGLD.

description.en: Wrap native eGold (EGLD) to WEGLD tokens. Convert EGLD to wrapped EGLD for use in DeFi protocols and smart contracts on the eGold ecosystem.
description.de: Wrappe natives eGold (EGLD) zu WEGLD Token. Konvertiere EGLD zu gewraptem EGLD für die Verwendung in DeFi-Protokollen und Smart Contracts im eGold-Ökosystem.

description.en: MultiversX, the EGLD network, is a distributed blockchain network for next-gen applications. Decentralized via 3,000+ nodes, scalable through sharding, fast, secure & green.
Wrap native eGold (EGLD) to WEGLD tokens. Convert EGLD to wrapped EGLD for use in DeFi protocols and smart contracts on the eGold ecosystem.
description.de: Wrappe natives eGold (EGLD) zu WEGLD Token. Konvertiere EGLD zu gewraptem EGLD für die Verwendung in DeFi-Protokollen und Smart Contracts im eGold-Ökosystem.

description.en: Amount of eGold to wrap to WEGLD.
description.de: Betrag an eGold zum Wrappen zu WEGLD.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Deposit
warp.title: Deposit funds to MultiSig
warp.description: Deposit EGLD or tokens into the multi-sig wallet. Anyone can deposit funds, and they can later be transferred via proposals.

inputs.name: Amount
inputs.description: The amount of EGLD or ESDT tokens to deposit.

messages.success: Funds deposited successfully to the MultiSig wallet.

body.en: Funds have been successfully deposited to the MultiSig wallet
body.de: Guthaben wurde erfolgreich auf die MultiSig-Wallet eingezahlt

description.en: View all proposals awaiting signatures in a multi-sig wallet. Shows which actions need approval and their current signature progress.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Get Pending Actions
warp.title: View pending proposals
warp.description: View all proposals awaiting signatures in a multi-sig wallet. Shows which actions need approval and their current signature progress.

messages.info: There are {{COUNT_FORMATTED}} proposal(s) waiting for board member signatures

label.en: Get notified when new proposals are created
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn neue Vorschläge erstellt werden

body.en: A new proposal has been created in the MultiSig wallet and is awaiting signatures
body.de: Ein neuer Vorschlag wurde in der MultiSig-Wallet erstellt und wartet auf Unterschriften

description.en: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Perform Action
warp.title: Execute a proposal
warp.description: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.

inputs.name: Action ID
inputs.description: The ID of the proposal to execute.
inputs.bot: If the user hasn't specified an action ID, first run 'Get Pending Actions' to show what's available.

upserts.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Add Board Member

description.en: Use when a user wants to add a new board member to the multi-sig. Board members can both propose and sign actions. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.

upserts.creator: github:JoAiHQ/warps

description.en: Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Add Board Member
warp.title: Propose adding a board member
warp.description: Use when a user wants to add a new board member to the multi-sig. Board members can both propose and sign actions. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.

inputs.name: Board Member Address
inputs.description: The wallet address of the new board member to add.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The proposal is now awaiting signatures from board members.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to add a new board member
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} zur Hinzufügung eines neuen Vorstandsmitglieds unterzeichnet

description.en: Use when a user wants to add a module to extend the multi-sig wallet's functionality. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Add Module
warp.title: Propose adding a module
warp.description: Use when a user wants to add a module to extend the multi-sig wallet's functionality. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.

inputs.name: Module Address
inputs.description: The address of the smart contract module to add.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The proposal to add a module is now awaiting signatures.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to add a module
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} zur Hinzufügung eines Moduls unterzeichnet

description.en: Use when a user wants to add a new proposer to the multi-sig. Proposers can create proposals but cannot sign them. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Add Proposer
warp.title: Propose adding a proposer
warp.description: Use when a user wants to add a new proposer to the multi-sig. Proposers can create proposals but cannot sign them. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.

inputs.name: Proposer Address
inputs.description: The wallet address of the new proposer to add.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The proposal is now awaiting signatures from board members.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to add a new proposer
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} zur Hinzufügung eines neuen Vorschlagenden unterzeichnet

description.en: Use when a user wants to make an asynchronous smart contract call from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal for calling another contract's endpoint with optional EGLD.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Async Call
warp.title: Propose async smart contract call
warp.description: Use when a user wants to make an asynchronous smart contract call from the multi-sig. Creates a proposal for calling another contract's endpoint with optional EGLD.

inputs.name: Contract Address
inputs.description: The smart contract address to call.

inputs.name: EGLD Amount
inputs.description: The amount of EGLD to send with the call (in wei, will be scaled by 18 decimals).

inputs.name: Gas Limit
inputs.description: Optional gas limit for the execution (leave empty for default).

inputs.name: Function Call
inputs.description: Function call data (hex encoded bytes).

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The async call proposal is now awaiting signatures.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} for an async call
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} für einen Async-Call unterzeichnet

description.en: Use when a user wants to change the number of signatures required to execute proposals in the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs current quorum approval.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Change Quorum
warp.title: Propose changing quorum
warp.description: Use when a user wants to change the number of signatures required to execute proposals in the multi-sig. Creates a proposal that needs current quorum approval.

inputs.name: New Quorum
inputs.description: The new minimum number of signatures required to execute actions.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The proposal is now awaiting signatures from board members.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to change the quorum to {{NEW_QUORUM}}
body.de: Ein Vorstandsmitglied hat Vorschlag #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} zur Änderung des Quorums auf {{NEW_QUORUM}} unterzeichnet

description.en: Use when a user wants to remove a module from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the module is removed.
Decentralized governance and multi-signature wallet platform for DAOs on MultiversX. Manage organizations and execute secure transactions with advanced multisig capabilities.
description.de: Dezentralisierte Governance- und Multi-Signatur-Wallet-Plattform für DAOs auf MultiversX. Verwalte Organisationen und führe sichere Transaktionen mit erweiterten Multisig-Funktionen aus.

warp.name: PeerMe MultiSig: Propose Remove Module
warp.title: Propose removing a module
warp.description: Use when a user wants to remove a module from the multi-sig wallet. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval before the module is removed.

inputs.name: Module Address
inputs.description: The address of the smart contract module to remove.

description.en: Takes the top digests of the week for a given interest, writes the newsletter copy, then creates a draft campaign in Mailcoach targeting that interest segment.
description.de: Nimmt die Top-Digests der Woche für ein Interessengebiet, schreibt den Newsletter-Text und erstellt einen Kampagnenentwurf in Mailcoach.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Weekly Digest Email

description.en: Takes the top digests of the week for a given interest, writes the newsletter copy, then creates a draft campaign in Mailcoach targeting that interest segment.
description.de: Nimmt die Top-Digests der Woche für ein Interessengebiet, schreibt den Newsletter-Text und erstellt einen Kampagnenentwurf in Mailcoach.

warp.bot: Used every Sunday per interest category as part of the weekly digest campaign workflow. Receives top digests filtered by interest, writes copy, creates Mailcoach campaign draft targeting that interest segment.

vars.EMAIL_LIST_UUID: env:MAILCOACH_HUB_LIST_USERS_UUID|UUID of the main hub subscribers list in Mailcoach
vars.TEMPLATE_UUID: env:MAILCOACH_DIGEST_TEMPLATE_UUID|UUID of the weekly digest email template in Mailcoach
vars.JOAI_API_BASE: env:JOAI_API_BASE|Base URL of the JoAi API (e.g. https://api.joai.ai)

description.en: The interest category to fetch digests for (e.g. business, health, developer).
The interest category (e.g. business, health, developer).
JSON array of digest objects from the previous step.

actions.prompt:
You are writing the weekly JoAi Digest newsletter for the '{{INTEREST}}' interest category. JoAi is an AI productivity platform that helps people build their second brain and automate their work.

Here are the top public digests from this week in the {{INTEREST}} category:

{{DIGESTS_JSON}}

Write the email body for subscribers interested in {{INTEREST}}. Keep it conversational, warm, and inspiring. Use Markdown formatting.

Include:
1. A brief 2-3 sentence intro tailored to the {{INTEREST}} audience
2. Each digest as a section with its name as a link, a 1-sentence hook, and a "Read →" link
3. A short sign-off encouraging readers to publish their own digest on JoAi (https://digests.joai.ai)

Do not include a subject line or email headers. Write only the body content.

inputs.name: name
inputs.transform: () => { const d = new Date(); const month = d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short' }); const day = d.getDate(); return `Weekly Digest ({{INTEREST}}) — ${month} ${day}`; }

inputs.name: subject
inputs.transform: () => { const d = new Date(); const month = d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short' }); const day = d.getDate(); return `JoAi Weekly Digest — ${month} ${day}`; }

success.en: Draft campaign '{{CAMPAIGN_NAME}}' created (UUID: {{CAMPAIGN_UUID}}). Review and send it via the send-campaign warp.
success.de: Kampagnenentwurf '{{CAMPAIGN_NAME}}' erstellt (UUID: {{CAMPAIGN_UUID}}). Prüfen und über den send-campaign-Warp senden.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.

warp.name: JoAi: Create Goal

description.en: Set a goal for your agent to proactively work toward.
description.de: Setze ein Ziel, auf das dein Agent proaktiv hinarbeitet.

warp.bot: Help the user define a clear, actionable goal. If they give a vague idea, help them refine it into a specific goal title. Ask about priority only if it seems relevant — most goals are normal priority.

inputs.name: Goal Title

description.en: A clear, actionable goal title
description.de: Ein klarer, umsetzbarer Zieltitel

inputs.bot: The goal title — a short, clear statement of what to achieve (e.g., 'Grow monthly revenue to $10k', 'Launch product by end of Q2')

inputs.name: Description

description.en: Optional details about what success looks like
description.de: Optionale Details darüber, wie Erfolg aussieht

inputs.bot: Optional extra context — what does achieving this goal look like? Any specific milestones or criteria?

inputs.name: Priority

description.en: How important is this goal?
description.de: Wie wichtig ist dieses Ziel?

inputs.bot: The priority level. Use 'normal' unless the user indicates urgency or high importance.

success.en: Goal '{{title}}' created! I'll proactively suggest ways to make progress on this goal.
success.de: Ziel '{{title}}' erstellt! Ich werde proaktiv Wege vorschlagen, um bei diesem Ziel Fortschritte zu machen.

description.en: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.
description.de: Speichere ein Wissen oder eine Tatsache als Erinnerung für deinen Agenten.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Create Memory

description.en: Save a piece of knowledge or fact as a memory for your agent.
description.de: Speichere ein Wissen oder eine Tatsache als Erinnerung für deinen Agenten.

warp.bot: Use this when the user shares a fact, preference, or piece of knowledge they want their agent to remember. The content should be a concise, self-contained statement.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: The fact or knowledge to remember
description.de: Das Wissen oder die Tatsache zum Merken

inputs.bot: A concise, self-contained statement of the fact or knowledge to remember.

inputs.name: Category

description.en: Category for this memory
description.de: Kategorie für diese Erinnerung

inputs.bot: Optional category like preference, fact, experience, or relationship.

inputs.name: Tags

description.en: Tags for categorization
description.de: Tags zur Kategorisierung

inputs.bot: Optional comma-separated tags to categorize this memory.

inputs.name: Team Visible

description.en: Whether this memory is visible to the whole team
description.de: Ob diese Erinnerung für das ganze Team sichtbar ist

inputs.bot: Set to true if this memory should be visible to all team members (e.g. shared context).

description.en: Set a timed reminder for your agent to notify you.
description.de: Setze eine zeitgesteuerte Erinnerung, damit dein Agent dich benachrichtigt.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Create Reminder

description.en: Set a timed reminder for your agent to notify you.
description.de: Setze eine zeitgesteuerte Erinnerung, damit dein Agent dich benachrichtigt.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to be reminded of something at a specific time. Extract the reminder text and when they want to be reminded.

inputs.name: Text

description.en: What to be reminded about
description.de: Woran erinnert werden soll

inputs.bot: The reminder text — what should the user be reminded about.

inputs.name: Scheduled At

description.en: When to send the reminder
description.de: Wann die Erinnerung senden

inputs.bot: ISO datetime for when to trigger the reminder (e.g., 2025-03-01T09:00:00Z). If the user says 'tomorrow', compute the actual date.

description.en: Crawl a URL and train your agent with the content as documents.
description.de: Eine URL crawlen und deinen Agenten mit dem Inhalt als Dokumente trainieren.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Train from URL

description.en: Crawl a URL and train your agent with the content as documents.
description.de: Eine URL crawlen und deinen Agenten mit dem Inhalt als Dokumente trainieren.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to train their agent by importing content from a website or URL.

inputs.name: URL

description.en: The URL to crawl and learn from
description.de: Die URL, die gecrawlt und gelernt werden soll

inputs.bot: The full URL of the website or page to crawl for training content.

inputs.name: Max Pages

description.en: Maximum number of pages to crawl (1–100)
description.de: Maximale Anzahl an Seiten zum Crawlen (1–100)

inputs.bot: Optional limit on how many pages to crawl. Defaults to no limit.

success.en: Training started on {{url}}. I'll crawl the pages and show you everything I find in this chat — you can review and edit each document or memory before saving.
success.de: Training gestartet auf {{url}}. Ich crawle die Seiten und zeige dir alles, was ich finde, in diesem Chat — du kannst jedes Dokument oder jede Erinnerung vor dem Speichern prüfen und bearbeiten.

description.en: Generate a checkout URL for upgrading a team to a paid plan. Routes to LemonSqueezy for consumers or Stripe for business accounts. Requires billing address to be set first.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Generate Upgrade Link

description.en: Generate a checkout URL for upgrading a team to a paid plan. Routes to LemonSqueezy for consumers or Stripe for business accounts. Requires billing address to be set first.

warp.bot: Use this as the final step after user-create and billing-address-set. The teamSlug comes from the user-create warp output. Returns a direct checkout URL to send to the customer.

inputs.name: Team Slug

description.en: The team slug (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The personalTeamSlug returned by the user-create warp.

inputs.name: Plan

description.en: The plan SKU to upgrade to

inputs.bot: The plan SKU. Use 'plus-monthly-00' for Plus monthly or 'plus-yearly-00' for Plus yearly.

description.en: Create a new user account with a personal team. Returns the user's id for use in subsequent steps.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Create User

description.en: Create a new user account with a personal team. Returns the user's id for use in subsequent steps.

warp.bot: Use this when you need to create a new user account on behalf of an admin. The verified flag marks the email as verified immediately, skipping the email confirmation flow.

inputs.name: Email

description.en: The email address for the new user

inputs.bot: The user's email address. If a user with this email already exists, the existing user is returned.

inputs.name: Verified

description.en: Mark email as verified (skips email confirmation)

inputs.bot: Set to true to skip email verification for admin-created accounts. Requires admin token.

description.en: Update the name on your profile.
description.de: Aktualisiere den Namen in deinem Profil.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

description.en: Update the name on your profile.
description.de: Aktualisiere den Namen in deinem Profil.

inputs.name: User Name

description.en: The user's personal name
description.de: Der persönliche Name des Benutzers

inputs.bot: For identification purposes.

success.en: I have updated your name to {{USER_NAME}}.
success.de: Ich habe deinen Namen auf {{USER_NAME}} aktualisiert.

description.en: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: List User Teams

description.en: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.

warp.bot: Use this after user-create to get the user's personal team slug. Pass the userId from user-create output. The personal team is marked with personal: true.

inputs.name: User ID

description.en: The id of the user (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The user's id returned by the user-create warp.
